entry.title: Overlap
entry.summary:
Author: odysseyofmemory

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 58,917Chapters: 17/?Kudos: 147

Summary: He smiles at her, one thousand Chans reflected one thousand times in the mirrored elevator walls. One thousands parallel universes where she could be in an elevator with Chan in Rome late at night, with his loverboy eyes, and how many of those universes are different? How many of those Chans have loverboy eyes? How many versions of her give in to them? How many good things actually happen to those versions after 2AM? or Everyone knows idols shouldn't date their staff. Chan's not sure if he cares anymore.

entry.title: Side Effects
entry.summary:
Author: TheLioness143

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 51,072Chapters: 16/?Kudos: 70

Summary: ((AU Bang Chan x Female Reader)) It was only supposed to be one night. A chance to feel something again. A stolen moment with a masked stranger. No promises, just an escape. A couple of days later, you play the perfect wife at a dinner you didn’t want to attend, until you see him again. Chris is seated at the same table, unmasked, and watching you like he already knows how this ends. The stakes rise with every stolen glance. By the time the cards hit the table, you’re no longer just a wife on someone’s arm. You’re the prize. For the first time in a long time, you’re starting to wonder if that’s exactly what you want to be.

entry.title: Testing The Limits
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,184Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 36

Summary: The two had been in this arrangement for quite some time now, and it worked well for them. Chan helped Jisung remain punctual, tidy, and organized. He really improved Jisung's life, and he seemed happy to do so. In return, Jisung was always good for him, sugary sweet, halting under his touch.  It had always been like that with them. He didn't need anything to change…right? Or; Sweet and submissive Jisung wants to try his hand at being a brat. His dom, Chan, rises to the occasion.

entry.title: Two Ghostfaces and Nowhere to Run
entry.summary:
Author: lieslostinsilence

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,431Chapters: 1/2Kudos: 8

Summary: The silence in your house is the first thing they steal. A creaking floorboard, a distorted voice, and suddenly you are no longer alone. Two masked hunters step out of the shadows, patient and cruel, letting you run just long enough to enjoy the chase. Fear burns through you, but something darker rises with it. When they finally catch you, escape stops mattering. Panic turns into heat, control slips from your hands, and being hunted becomes something far more dangerous. Some predators do not want to kill you. They want to keep you.

entry.title: You Don’t Get to Shrink
entry.summary:
Author: Future_Dr_Smut (Coffee_Cats_And_Vibes)

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,616Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 6

Summary: After your double mastectomy and flat closure, intimacy has been careful. Gentle. Safe. Tonight, you don’t want safe. You don’t want softness. You want to be handled. Claimed. Reminded that you are still powerful, still desirable, still Chris's. This fic explores post-mastectomy with flat closure body image, negotiated dominance, consensual degradation, and the raw vulnerability of being seen fully. Healing isn’t always soft. Sometimes it kneels.

entry.summary:
Author: feetslix

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,000Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 223

entry.title: You know I can’t leave you alone
entry.summary:
Author: lixiemyfavv

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,802Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 19

Summary: -So can you please come over closer?- “Did I tell you to move, Jinnie?”, Chans voice was a low, dangerous vibration that sent a jolt of liquid head straight to Hyunjins aching cock. “No, but-“ “But nothing.” Chan interrupted, his eyes dark and fixed on the way the chain bites into the pale, sweat slicked skin of Hyunjins throat. Chan reaches forward, his large, veiny hand covering Hyunjins shaky ones at his waist. Chan doesn’t push them away, he squeezes them as a firm reminder of the difference in control between them. “Hands on the bed. Now, Hyunjin.” -Hold me tight, right now.- Or Bangchan and Hyunjin finish shooting the m/v for Red lights. Hyunjin is needy and desperate— and begins acting like a brat. Bangchan is more than happy to put him in his place, Hyunjin learns to beg.

entry.title: When thou yield’st to me
entry.summary:
Author: LadyOfTheGreenArrow

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,341Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 153

Summary: “You want to make your hyungs happy, don’t you, Sungie?” Chan asks. Jisung blinks sleepily at Chan, then down at Chan’s hand, then at Chan again. “But I don’t understand, hyung. What are you doing?” Chan brushes some stray hair that had fallen into Jisung’s face while he slept. “That’s okay. You don’t need to understand. You just need to be a good boy for your hyungs and do what we tell you to do. You think you can do that?” OR Jisung falls asleep in the studio and his hyungs take the chance to relieve some stress.

entry.title: Private Until It Wasn’t
entry.summary:
Author: lieslostinsilence

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,808Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 17

Summary: What was meant to stay behind a closed door turns into something exposed and irreversible. Desire is caught, not hidden, and Chan chooses control over restraint the moment it’s witnessed. Jeongin steps into something he has only listened to, only imagined, and learns how quickly curiosity becomes need. Watching turns into obedience. Silence turns into instruction. Boundaries are crossed slowly, then all at once, until wanting is louder than doubt. What happens cannot be unseen, unfelt, or taken back.

entry.title: Anchored
entry.summary:
Author: Kpoplover08

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,679Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 105

Summary: Han never expected to find a place where he felt safe. After years of feeling untethered in a world that demands labels and classifications, he finds himself thrust into a polycule that sees him—really sees him. What starts as tentative trust slowly becomes something deeper: comfort, belonging, and the terrifying possibility of permanence. But choosing to be anchored means choosing vulnerability. And Han has to decide if he’s ready to stop standing alone.

entry.title: Whispers through Stone
entry.summary:
Author: minniexwrites

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,733Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 27

Summary: Chan falls in love with the voice of the boy in the next cell, separated only by a stone wall. In a place where identities don’t matter and time is running out, their whispered conversations and soft touches become everything to him. But when the guards come for Hyunjin, Chan’s desperate attempt to save him reveals a devastating truth... The stranger he fell for was never a stranger at all.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Bang Chan/Hwang Hyunjin
